issue_title: When Heading 1 is selected, all other heading levels are disabled
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the bug

If I style some text as _Heading 1_, I cannot switch it to any other heading level, because they are disabled in the `MenuSelectHeading` component.  I have to first switch it to _Paragraph_ and then to the desired _Heading 2-6_. 

This only happens with _Heading 1_, all oth
test_description_zh: 在编辑器中输入一段文字，使用 MenuSelectHeading 组件将其设置为「标题1」样式，然后再次打开 MenuSelectHeading 下拉菜单，观察其他标题级别（标题2~标题6）的可选状态，并尝试直接切换到其他标题级别。
expected_result_zh: 当文字已被设置为「标题1」后，再次打开标题选择下拉菜单时，标题2~标题6选项应均为可用（非禁用）状态，用户可以直接从标题1切换到任意其他标题级别，无需先切换回「段落」再选择目标标题。
